title: Getting Started with Gemini
subtitle: Use Gemini for research, drafting, and everyday problem solving in 3 days

modules.title: Meet Gemini
lessons: What Gemini is and what it does well
How to ask Gemini clear questions
How to compare different answers and refine prompts
modules.mini_task: Ask Gemini to explain a current topic in plain language

modules.title: Daily Productivity with Gemini
lessons: Using Gemini to draft messages and notes
modules.mini_task: Use Gemini to create a simple weekly checklist

modules.title: Better Answers from Gemini
lessons: When to give examples or context
How to evaluate if an answer is useful
modules.mini_task: Improve one weak answer by rewriting your prompt and adding context

final_project: Use Gemini to research, organize, and present a small topic in a clear step-by-step outline.
